macro_segments.title: Bor (Pit): Definition, Death vs. Injury Liability, and Status of Roadside Hazards

micro_segments.title: Bor as a Category: Implicit in Torah, Not Requiring Detailed Derivation

macro_segments.title: Ma'aveh: Definition Dispute Between Rav (Adam HaMazik) and Shmuel (Shen), and the Broader Categorization

micro_segments.title: Shmuel's View: Ma'aveh is Shen; Rav's View: Ma'aveh is Adam HaMazik (Damaging Person)

macro_segments.title: Adam HaMazik (Damaging Person): Avos and Potential Toldos

micro_segments.title: Proposed Toldah: Awake Damage as Av, Sleep Damage as Toldah—Rejected
Adam Mu'ad L'Olam: Person Always Liable Regardless of Conscious State
Proposed Toldah: Spitting/Mucus and Other Forms of Kocho (Projected Force)—Rejected
All Toldos of Adam HaMazik are Ke'Yotzei Bahen (Same Law)

macro_segments.title: Esh (Fire): Definition as Koach Acher Me'urav (Mixed External Force) and its Toldos

Confirmation: Toldah of Esh is Ke'Yotzei Bahen (Same Law)
